## Agent name

What is the product or tool name?

## How do you use it?

- [ ] Native app
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] VS Code / Cursor extension
- [ ] Web UI / localhost
- [ ] Other

## What should Agent Pet detect?

- [ ] App installed
- [ ] Process running
- [ ] Current task active
- [ ] Completion
- [ ] Warning / error state

## Known paths or signals

If you know any of these, include them:

- App name:
- Log path:
- Local URL:
- Process name / keywords:

## Notes

Anything else that would help add support faster.
